title: No More Confusing Glow Lichen
description: Replaces glow lichen texture to something that doesn't look like diamonds!
body:
Is glow lichen **always** making you think you just found some diamonds, but you actually didn't and now you want to delete your pc from existence?

Well, worry no more! We are here to help!

This resource pack changes the way glow lichen looks, so that you will not confuse it for diamonds!

![New Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a98603f5022422e2e1e841e8e6e2a555849447e.png)

We would really appreciate it if you join [our discord server!](https://discord.gg/jC6RN6RT4P)
